text: Dr. Zhang, M.D., Ph.D., F.A.C.C., presented at the 5th Ann. Conf. on Cardiology (ISBN: 978-0-12-345678-9) data showing LDL reductions of 42%±7% using 20mg/dL dosing protocols.

text: The manuscript cited Vol. 47, No. 3, pp. 1234–89 of the J. Phys. Chem., noting that samples required ≥99.9% purity and storage at −80°C±2°C in 50μg/mL aliquots.

text: The property at 789 St. Clair Ave., measuring 2,450ft² (227.6m²), sold for £875,000.50 to Mr. & Mrs. St. John-Smythe, Esq., C.Eng., F.I.C.E. on Feb. 14th at 2:15pm.

spoken_form: Professor M B E K I will record N E E V's record-breaking translation of N A H W A T L poetry with remarkable gemütlichkeit.

text: The content of Saoirse's thesis made her content, exploring weltanschauung in Gloucester's medieval texts.
spoken_form: The content of Saoirse's thesis made her content, exploring weltanschauung in Gloucester's medieval texts.

text: Eithne and Caoilfhinn debated the mise en scène while eating Worcestershire sauce with Dr. Nguyen.

text: We fine-tuned LLaMA 3.1 405B using LoRA on the meta-llama/Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct-hf checkpoint with rank 64 adapters.
spoken_form: We fine-tuned LLaMA three point one four oh five B using LoRA on the meta-llama slash Llama three point one four oh five B Instruct HF checkpoint with rank sixty-four adapters.

text: We benchmarked 01-ai/Yi-1.5-34B-Chat-16K against meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct using MMLU, GSM8K@4-shot, and HumanEval benchmarks.
spoken_form: We benchmarked zero one A I slash Yi one point five thirty-four B Chat sixteen K against meta-llama slash Llama three point one seventy B Instruct using M M L U, G S M eight K at four-shot, and HumanEval benchmarks.

text: The claude-sonnet-4-5 model outperformed Gemma-2-27B-it on coding benchmarks as described in §3.2 of the technical report.
spoken_form: The claude sonnet four dash five model outperformed Gemma two twenty-seven B I T on coding benchmarks as described in section three point two of the technical report.

text: Comparing meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat-hf versus GPT-4o shows that FP16 quantization reduces latency by 40% without accuracy loss.
spoken_form: Comparing meta-llama slash Llama two seven b chat HF versus G P T four oh shows that F P sixteen quantization reduces latency by forty percent without accuracy loss.

text: Our pipeline is based on LLaMA-3.1-8B → fine-tuned on ShareGPT4 → RLHF’d with DPO, then merged into the mistralai/Mixtral-8×7B-Instruct-v0.1 architecture.
spoken_form: Our pipeline is based on LLaMA three point one eight B to fine-tuned on ShareGPT four to RLHF'd with DPO, then merged into the mistralai slash Mixtral eight times seven B Instruct v zero point one architecture.

text: We fine-tuned deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B on 4×A100 80GB SXM with bf16, ZeRO-3, gradient_checkpointing=True, and lr=2e-5.
spoken_form: We fine-tuned deepseek-ai slash DeepSeek R one Distill Qwen thirty-two B on four times A one hundred eighty gigabyte S X M with B F sixteen, ZeRO three, gradient checkpointing equals True, and learning rate equals two times ten to the minus five.

text: We loaded mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1 from Hugging Face and applied LoRA fine-tuning at checkpoint-5000 with 3.2B parameters.
spoken_form: We loaded mistralai slash Mistral seven B Instruct v zero point one from Hugging Face and applied LoRA fine-tuning at checkpoint five thousand with three point two B parameters.

text: Our experiments with Gemma-2-27B-it and INT8 quantization on the mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.1 checkpoint-5000 achieved 87.6% accuracy on MMLU.
spoken_form: Our experiments with Gemma two twenty-seven B it and INT eight quantization on the mistralai slash Mistral seven B Instruct v zero point one checkpoint five thousand achieved eighty-seven point six percent accuracy on MMLU.

text: For participants ages 18–65, blood pressure should range from 90/60 to 120/80 mmHg, with temperatures between 97.8°F and 99.1°F.
spoken_form: For participants ages eighteen to sixty-five, blood pressure should range from ninety over sixty to one hundred twenty over eighty millimeters of mercury, with temperatures between ninety-seven point eight degrees Fahrenheit and ninety-nine point one degrees Fahrenheit.

text: Henry VIII's reign from 1509–1547 saw England's break from Rome, while Louis XIV of France ruled for 72 years.
spoken_form: Henry the Eighth's reign from fifteen oh nine to fifteen forty-seven saw England's break from Rome, while Louis the Fourteenth of France ruled for seventy-two years.

spoken_form: The spacecraft traveled two point five times ten to the ninth miles at temperatures from minus forty degrees Celsius to plus one hundred twenty degrees Celsius, covering the distance in approximately three to two the predicted time.

text: King Henry the 3rd (III), King Henry the 8th (VIII), and the XXIInd amendment were all discussed in the IVth century BC symposium.
spoken_form: King Henry the third, King Henry the eighth, and the twenty-second amendment were all discussed in the fourth century B C symposium.

text: DO NOT—and I mean DO NOT—open that email attachment under ANY circumstances whatsoever.
spoken_form: DO NOT — and I mean DO NOT — open that email attachment under ANY circumstances whatsoever.

text: Ugh, seriously? I've told you like... I don't know, a MILLION times already.
spoken_form: Ugh, seriously? I've told you like... I don't know, a MILLION times already.

spoken_form: He started snoring—zzz, zzz—and I just thought... you know what, forget it. Not worth it.
